stemHtml: Which of the following conditions could result in the absence of a stall warning on a commercial air transport jet aeroplane?

options.a: Ice on the fuselage increasing the aeroplane's mass and leading to a stall at a higher speed.
options.b: Ice on the wings causing a stall at a lower angle of attack than the normal critical angle of attack.
options.c: Icing of the pitot tubes causing erroneous speed indications and leading to a stall at a higher indicated speed.
options.d: Ice on the tailplane causing premature boundary layer separation on the stabiliser.
